metadata.title: Karensa Studio
metadata.description: Software development studio crafting websites, web apps and ERP systems.

hero.subtitle: Karensa is a software development studio. We craft fast websites, scalable web apps, and tailored ERP systems for ambitious brands — from idea to launch.
hero.stackLabel: Built with a modern, battle-tested stack

services.title: Everything you need to ship
services.subtitle: One studio for design, engineering and the systems that run your business.

web.title: Web Design & Development
web.desc: Marketing sites and landing pages that load fast, rank well, and convert — built with Next.js and Tailwind.

apps.title: Web Applications
apps.desc: Dashboards, platforms and SaaS products engineered for performance, reliability and scale.

erp.title: ERP & Business Systems
erp.desc: Custom Odoo and internal tooling that streamline operations, sales and inventory across your company.

cms.title: CMS & Content Platforms
cms.desc: Flexible, editor-friendly websites powered by Directus, WordPress and headless architectures.

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.desc: Native and cross-platform iOS & Android apps built with React Native — fast, polished, and production-ready.

social.title: Photography & Social Media
social.desc: Professional product and brand photography combined with content strategy to make your social presence stand out.

work.title: Projects we're proud of
work.subtitle: A selection of recent products and platforms shipped for our clients.

contact.title: Let's build something great
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within one business day.

form.subject: Subject

footer.tagline: A software development studio building websites, web apps and ERP systems for ambitious brands.
